name: Kartoffelpfannkuchen (Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the raw potatoes on a medium grater.
2. Mix grated potatoes into water to which lemon juice has been added.
3. Place the mixture in a strainer or cheese cloth and drain off liquid thoroughly.
4. Beat the boiled and mashed potato with beaten egg, milk, and salt until well combined to form a batter.
5. Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a large frying pan.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil to form 3-4 pancakes at a time.
7. Cook the pancakes on one side until firm, then loosen the edges and flip.
8. Brown the other side of the pancakes, then remove with a spatula and drain on paper towels.
9. Keep the cooked pancakes warm and continue cooking the remaining batter in batches.
10. Serve immediately. If served with meat, sprinkle with salt. If served with applesauce, sprinkle with sugar.
